DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS FILED BY DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER ON DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THAT HE HAS A PROBABLY VALID REAL PROPERTY CLAIM BY HIS CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PARTITION AND CORPORATE DISSOLUTION, PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIED WITH THE SERVICE AND FILING REQUIREMENTS AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT CONTEND THAT IT DID NOT RECEIVE ACTUAL NOTICE. PLAINTIFF SHALL IMMEDIATELY FILE PROOFS OF SERVICE OF THE LIS PENDENS WITH THE CLERK OF COURT. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR ATTORNEY FEES ARE DENIED. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY, DEFENDANT ACTED WITH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOWARD L. HIBBARD, TEL. NO. (650) 347-5010 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens IS Denied. Plaintiff has shown that he has a probably valid real property claim by his causes of action for partition and corporate dissolution, Plaintiff substantially complied with the service and filing requirements and Defendant does not contend that it did not receive actual notice. Plaintiff shall immediately file proofs of service of the lis pendens with the clerk of court. Both parties' requests for attorney fees are denied. Although Plaintiff is the prevailing party, Defendant acted with substantial justification. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian K. Hilliard, Esq., of Law Offices of Brian Hilliard, Tel. 510.653.8886, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Howard L. Hibbard, Esq., of Law Office of Howard L. Hibbard, Tel. 650.347.5010., appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend to permit plaintiff to file his proposed second amended complint. By seeking leave to file a second amended complaint, plaintiff concedes that the demurrer should be sustained with leave to amend. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian K. Hilliard, Esq., of Law Offices of Brian Hilliard, Tel. 510.653.8886, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Howard L. Hibbard, Esq., of Law Office of Howard L. Hibbard, Tel. 650.347.5010., appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: For good cause, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WWC SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is continued to March 23, 2012. Defense counsel provided courtesy copies of the moving papers to the court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
